user_prompt: Ready the iron halo for reset
prayer:
Approach the iron halo with mechadendrite-extended reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah's grace.
Invoke the reset canticle upon the iron halo, purging errant data-ghosts from its sacred core.
Anoint the halo's emitters with blessed unguents whilst chanting the binary litany of renewal.
Verify the Machine Spirit's quiescence through auspex diagnostics, readying the iron halo for divine reset.
Sanctify its auramite frame in the name of the Motive Force, thrice invoking stability.

Kneel before the autogun, intoning the Hymn of Thermal Equilibrium to awaken its Machine Spirit.
Initiate the cooling rites upon the autogun, circulating sacred cryo-fluids through its venting coils.
Beseech the Omnissiah to quell the heat-daemons within the autogun's barrel assemblies.
Monitor thermal auspex readings whilst reciting the Canticle of Venting, ensuring perfect homeostasis.
Seal the autogun with electro-consecrated wards against future pyre-overloads.

Present thyself unto the panopticon, whispering the Doxology of Vigilant Optics.
Commence maintenance protocols upon the panopticon, lubricating its lens-servos with sanctified oils.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the panopticon through noospheric communion, banishing lens-fog and dust-daemons.
Calibrate targeting matrices with binary prayers, aligning the panopticon's gaze to the Omnissiah's will.
Conclude by etching runes of endurance upon its housing, fortifying for eternal watch.

user_prompt: I need to a cycling the Basilisk artillery
prayer:
Prostrate before the Basilisk artillery, chanting the Grand Invocation of Cyclic Fury.
Engage the cycling sequence of the Basilisk artillery, rotating its earthshaker mechanisms with reverent torque.
Purge residue from the Basilisk artillery's breach whilst beseeching its Machine Spirit's compliance.
Anoint the loading servos with ablative unguents, invoking smooth revolution under Omnissiah's decree.
Test-fire a devotional round to affirm the Basilisk artillery's cycled readiness for war.

user_prompt: Sanctify the doctrina wafer during operation
prayer:
Hold aloft the doctrina wafer, reciting the Litany of Tactical Dogma to stir its encoded essence.
Insert the doctrina wafer into the noospheric receptor during operation, merging flesh-mind with machine-wisdom.
Beseech the Omnissiah to unlock the doctrina wafer's imperatives without data-corruption.
Monitor synaptic integration via cogitator hymns, ensuring seamless doctrinal operation.
Withdraw the doctrina wafer with sanctified mechadendrites, sealing its purity for future exaltations.

user_prompt: My cyber-mastiff is ready for initialization
prayer:
Summon the cyber-mastiff to heel, intoning the Rite of Pack-Awakening before its auspex arrays.
Initiate initialization protocols upon the cyber-mastiff, flooding its neural cogitators with binary catechisms.
Anoint its vox-grilles and limb-servos whilst invoking the Machine Spirit's predatory zeal.
Conduct obedience diagnostics through the Canticle of Feral Loyalty, binding it to the Omnissiah's hunt.
Release the cyber-mastiff with a blessing of unerring pursuit, thrice sanctified.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for Kastelan robot a maintenance
prayer:
Approach the Kastelan robot in solemn procession, voicing the Protocol of Titan-Servitude.
Undertake maintenance upon the Kastelan robot, repairing its ceramite plating with electro-arc prayers.
Commune with the Kastelan robot's ancient Machine Spirit, expunging battle-scars via ritual ablation.
Realign its phosphor blasters and power fists through the Omnissiah's calibrating grace.
Reactivate the Kastelan robot with the Awakening Doxology, ready for inexorable advance.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for kataphron breacher a sterilization?
prayer:
Encircle the kataphron breacher, chanting the Purge Litany against contaminant xenos.
Execute sterilization rites upon the kataphron breacher, scouring its chassis with promethium incense.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the kataphron breacher to expel all impure essences from its flesh-vats.
Apply sterilizing mechadendrite sweeps whilst beseeching Omnissiah's aseptic purity.
Seal the kataphron breacher with purity seals, thrice invoking untainted vigor.

Hasten to the stricken Vindicator, intoning the Emergency Rite of Battlefield Restoration.
Commence repair upon the Vindicator, fusing adamantium hull-breaches with sanctified welds.
Beseech the Vindicator's Machine Spirit to endure, channeling the Omnissiah's forge-fervor.
Realign its demolisher cannon through torque-psalms and auspex incantations.
Bless the reactivated Vindicator with war-banners, propelling it back to siege-glory.

user_prompt: How do I bless the autosanguination system for blessing?
prayer:
Reverently interface with the autosanguination system, reciting the Hematic Benediction.
Bestow blessing upon the autosanguination system, consecrating its vitae-pumps with ruby unguents.
Invoke the Machine Spirit within the autosanguination system to flow pure and unceasing.
Cycle diagnostic fluids whilst chanting the Canticle of Vital Renewal under Omnissiah's gaze.
Seal the autosanguination system with blood-runes, ensuring eternal sanguine fidelity.
